summary: Phase 2 E2E testing complete. Backend Phase 2 suite: 8 passed / 1 skipped (FII-DII Moneycontrol HTTP 403 — external scraping blocked, but UI degrades gracefully). All previously broken endpoints now fixed: TCS technicals NaN, holders majorHoldersBreakdown (insidersPercentHeld=51.18%, institutionsPercentHeld=28.67%, institutionsCount=393), insider transaction labels, overview dividendYield. Concall AI summary works via 'alternative' source (BSE PDF geo-blocked → Gemini synthesizes from news+screener — UI shows 'INDIRECT (NEWS+SCREENER)' badge). Frontend: sidebar shows MY WATCHLIST + PRICE ALERTS, RELIANCE click loads full dashboard, WATCHLIST star toggles + sidebar instantly updates with toast 'RELIANCE added to watchlist', Add Alert form creates TCS @ 3500 alert that persists across reload, EXPORT PDF button visible, all Phase 2 panels (Concalls, Peers, Options, Insider, FII/DII) render.

minor.issue: Moneycontrol returns HTTP 403 from server IP — rows=[], frontend shows 'Data unavailable'. Consider adding NSE/NSDL fallback or geo-routed proxy. Graceful in UI.

action_items: (Optional) Add fallback FII/DII source (NSDL direct or NSE) since Moneycontrol 403s from server geo. UI already degrades to 'Data unavailable' so non-blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: Concall summary 'source' field flows correctly to UI badge; consider standardizing to lowercase enum across backend/frontend.
FII/DII endpoint silently swallows scraper errors into {rows:[], error:'HTTP 403'} — good for UX; consider exponential backoff + retry-with-different-UA to improve hit rate.
Frontend watchlist/alerts use localStorage + window events ('watchlist-changed'/'alerts-changed') — verified persistence across page reload.
seed_data_creation: None — created TCS@3500 alert during test (verified persistence via reload).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_phase2.py /app/backend/tests/test_stocksentinel.py -v. Concall AI summary takes 15-25s (Gemini). BSE PDFs geo-blocked → expect source='alternative'. NSE options also geo-blocked → expect available=false. Moneycontrol FII/DII returns HTTP 403 — endpoint returns {rows:[], error} and UI shows 'Data unavailable' (acceptable graceful fail). Use RELIANCE for richest dashboard data.
rca of the issue: Only remaining issue is external geo-blocking (Moneycontrol 403, BSE PDF, NSE options). All app-side functionality works. Mitigation: server already implements graceful fallbacks (alternative AI source, 'Data unavailable' UI, 'Options temporarily unavailable' UI).
